name: doc-writer
description: Document source code accurately: add or update in-code doc comments (docstrings, TSDoc/JSDoc, rustdoc, Go doc comments) on public modules, types, and functions, and folder/module-level docs describing a directory's purpose and contents. Documents what the code actually does, matches the repo's conventions, and changes docs/comments only — never behavior. Use to document changed files in the coding/PR pipeline, or a target file/folder on demand.
